name: The Systems Administrator
effect: Keep everything running without acknowledgment. This card is considered non-critical.

clauses.name: UPTIME PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If this card is in play: All other cards are considered functional.

clauses.name: INVISIBILITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card is functioning correctly: No one knows it exists.

clauses.name: ABSENCE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If this card is removed: Three things break simultaneously and no one knows why.
